svg.text: Because each edge is conditioned on all other metabolites, indirect (shared-driver) links vanish

svg.text: and only DIRECT associations remain. On MTBLS1 → 12 edges; the top edge creatine–creatinine (r =

svg.text: 0.97) is a real metabolic conversion. On cohorts with no direct structure the network is empty —
